'''vajuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinee|vaccinee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinee|vaccinee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vajuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjizhith|væjizhith]] || [[word:væjizhij|væjizhij]] || [[word:væjizhish|væjizhish]] || [[word:væjizhi|væjizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajujuzhuth|vajujuzhuth]] || [[word:vajujuzhuj|vajujuzhuj]] || [[word:vajujuzhush|vajujuzhush]] || [[word:vajujuzhu|vajujuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajuzhuth|vajuzhuth]] || [[word:vajuzhuj|vajuzhuj]] || [[word:vajuzhush|vajuzhush]] || [[word:vajuzhu|vajuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajufzhuth|vajufzhuth]] || [[word:vajufzhuj|vajufzhuj]] || [[word:vajufzhush|vajufzhush]] || [[word:vajufzhuf|vajufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajuzhuthu|vajuzhuthu]] || [[word:vajuzhuju|vajuzhuju]] || [[word:vajuzhushu|vajuzhushu]] || [[word:vajuzhuku|vajuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajuzhuth|vajuzhuth]] || [[word:vajuzhuj|vajuzhuj]] || [[word:vajuzhush|vajuzhush]] || [[word:vajuzhu|vajuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajuzhuthul|vajuzhuthul]] || [[word:vajuzhujul|vajuzhujul]] || [[word:vajuzhushul|vajuzhushul]] || [[word:vajuzhukul|vajuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajuzhuthuthu|vajuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:vajuzhujuju|vajuzhujuju]] || [[word:vajuzhushushu|vajuzhushushu]] || [[word:vajuzhuku|vajuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajuzhuthun|vajuzhuthun]] || [[word:vajuzhujun|vajuzhujun]] || [[word:vajuzhushun|vajuzhushun]] || [[word:vajuzhukun|vajuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajuzhuthuoro|vajuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:vajuzhujuoro|vajuzhujuoro]] || [[word:vajuzhushuoro|vajuzhushuoro]] || [[word:vajuzhukuoro|vajuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
